title: HeavyLift International
summary: HeavyLift International was an aviation cargo airlines company that operated from Sharjah International Airport in the United Arab Emirates. It began operations in 2004 and ceased operations in 2011.
text:
HeavyLift International was an aviation cargo airlines company that operated from Sharjah International Airport in the United Arab Emirates. It began operations in 2004 and ceased operations in 2011.
